# Email Agent

## Description
AI-powered email assistant — fetches unread Gmail emails and generates replies using Groq LLM. Built with Flask.

## Tech Stack
Python 3.11, Flask, Groq (llama-3.3-70b-versatile), IMAP (Gmail), SMTP (Gmail), Bootstrap 5

## Core Files
- app.py: Flask app — IMAP fetch unread, Groq generate reply, SMTP send
- knowledge_base.txt: Business context for TechFix IT Repairs (services, pricing, policies)
- templates/index.html: Bootstrap UI with editable draft replies

## Key Patterns
- IMAP4_SSL to Gmail, search for UNSEEN only, dedup with OrderedDict by email_id
- Multi-part email parsing with text/plain fallback
- System prompt injection with knowledge_base content for context-aware replies
- Three LLM providers in code (Groq active, Mistral + Gemini commented)
- SMTP with STARTTLS for sending, gunicorn for deployment

## Entry Point
python app.py (local) or gunicorn app:app (Render)

## API Keys (.env)
EMAIL_ADDRESS, EMAIL_PASSWORD, GROQ_API_KEY (MISTRAL_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY optional)

## Routes
- GET / — fetch unread emails, render with drafts
- POST /send-email — send reply via SMTP
